title: Squatto Iron Golem
description: Replaces Iron Golems with Squatto from Ao Oni.
body:
Simply replaces Iron Golems with Squatto from Ao Oni. _Ao Oni created by noprops_ # Required Mods If you use **Forge** or **Fabric**, **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** and **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** are required.
Otherwise, if you use something like Optifine; you should be good to go.
